markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 522. Commercial Driver's Licenses
##### § 522.090 — Additional Penalty

In addition to any penalty imposed under this chapter, a person convicted of an offense under Section 522.071 (Driving While Disqualified Prohibited) (a)(5) may be penalized or disqualified under 49 C.F.R. Part 383.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*
